expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: postgresClient.ts has all 3 drivers: NeonPool+drizzleNeon for NEXT_RUNTIME+neondb, neon()+drizzleNeonHttp for scripts+neondb, Pool+drizzle for local postgres

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: Uses Proxy object with getDb() called on property access — connection deferred until first query

expectations.text: casing: 'snake_case' set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: drizzle.config.ts line 13: casing: 'snake_case'. postgresClient.ts: all 3 drizzle() calls have { schema, casing: 'snake_case' }
services/database/repositories/users.ts with getAllUsers, getUserById, getUserByWalletAddress, createUser

expectations.text: Root package.json has proxy scripts (drizzle-kit, db:seed, db:wipe)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json has drizzle-kit, db:seed, db:wipe proxying to @se-2/nextjs workspace

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml at project root with postgres:16 image, port 5432, volume mount

expectations.text: All required dependencies in correct locations (drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, tsx, @types/pg)
expectations.evidence: All 8 packages present: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv in deps; drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, @types/pg, tsx in devDeps
